subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! Thy letter was received, and from the severe trials and mighty tribulations that have befallen thee, extreme sorrow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست قدیم نامه شما رسید و از صدمات شدیده ... از صدمات شديده و امتحانات عظيمه که بر شما وارد گشته نهايت حزن
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @early Christian persecutions; the Pharisees, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @consolation and comfort
